name: ai-model-shim
description: Universal AI Model Shim for Cursor - Supporting Kimi K2.6 and DeepSeek V4 Pro

scripts.start:kimi: set CURRENT_MODEL=kimi-k2.6&& set SHIM_TARGET=https://api.moonshot.ai/v1&& node server.js
scripts.start:deepseek: set CURRENT_MODEL=deepseek-v4-pro&& set SHIM_TARGET=https://api.deepseek.com&& node server.js

author: Cursor User
